robot_capabilities.delivery_bot1: Differential drive carry robot for indoor transport and cooperative item delivery.
robot_capabilities.delivery_bot2: Holonomic carry robot capable of omnidirectional movement for precise transport and cooperative delivery.

robot_morphology.delivery_bot1: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 5 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.delivery_bot2: Drive Type: Holonomic, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional

task_specific_rules: All robots are designated as carry robots for transport and delivery tasks.
Differential drive robots are preferred for straight-line and formation-based transport tasks.
Holonomic robots are preferred for precise positioning, docking, and confined space transport.
Holonomic robots may assist differential drive robots during cooperative payload transport.
